name: Journalist Source Intake
description: Journalist source intake for reporters and editors documenting a new source relationship, assessing a tip or lead, or structuring a confidential source agreement. Evaluates the source's knowledge, reliability, potential bias, the information provided, the confidentiality agreement, and the corroboration requirements to produce a source intake profile with verification priorities and source relationship documentation.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
